Professional Grade Weather Resistant 13 oz Vinyl Banners - Standard Commercial Grade Product Configuration: Complete Banner Frame Kit with Hardware & Custom Vinyl Banner Quantity Selection: (Minimum: 1, Maximum: 1000 units) Standard Frame Size: 42" x 138" Display Area PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Material & Hardware for Quick Banner Swapping

Professional banner frames offer a revolutionary mounting solution for displaying custom vinyl banners on any flat surface including brick, wood, concrete, and metal walls. These heavy-duty aluminum frame systems are engineered to withstand extreme weather conditions while maintaining professional appearance throughout extended outdoor use.

The innovative snap-frame design allows vinyl banners to be swapped out in minutes, making it effortless to update your commercial signage for seasonal promotions, sales events, or business announcements. Each banner frame kit includes both the professional-grade aluminum hardware and your custom printed vinyl banner.

Professional 4' x 12' Banner Frame Specifications

  • Frame Material: Heavy-duty aluminum construction with weather-resistant finish
  • Display Size: 42" x 138" viewable area
  • Mounting: Universal mounting system for brick, concrete, wood, and metal surfaces
  • Banner Exchange: Quick-change system for easy banner updates
  • Durability: Engineered for extreme weather conditions and long-term outdoor use

Banner Material Options for Frame System

13 oz Vinyl Banners: Standard commercial-grade material rated for both indoor and outdoor applications. Provides excellent print quality and durability for most business signage needs.

18 oz Vinyl Banners: Heavy-duty premium material offering maximum durability and weather resistance. Ideal for high-traffic areas and extended outdoor installations requiring superior longevity.

Note: Vinyl materials are temperature sensitive. Acceptable size variance up to 1/2 inch per linear foot may occur due to heat application during printing and climate conditions.

Request free material samples to evaluate quality for your specific application.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Artwork Options for Banner Frame Graphics

Professional Design Guidelines for Banner Frame Artwork

For optimal print quality on banner frame graphics, vector-based file formats such as .eps files with fonts converted to outlines produce the best results. High-resolution .pdf or .jpg files are also acceptable for banner frame printing.

Our professional graphic design team can assist with artwork preparation and optimization for banner frame applications to ensure your graphics display properly within the frame specifications.

Order Proof Options for Banner Frame Projects

Order proofs provide verification of artwork, sizing, and order details before production begins. Your banner frame proof includes a low-resolution artwork preview, complete order summary with pricing, and billing/shipping information confirmation.

When requesting proofs, banner frame production will not begin until you provide written approval of all order details.

Color Matching Services for Critical Banner Frame Applications

For color-critical banner frame projects requiring precise color matching, our Color Match Proof System provides the most accurate color verification available. Contact customer service for specific details about color matching for your banner frame graphics.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Production & Turnaround Times

Professional banner frame production requires 7-10 business days to complete both frame assembly and custom vinyl banner printing. This timeframe ensures proper quality control for both hardware components and graphic printing.

Standard 7-10 Business Day Production:

  • Most popular turnaround option for custom banner frames
  • Includes complete frame assembly and vinyl banner printing
  • Quality inspection of hardware and graphics before shipping
  • Free standard production timeframe

Orders received after 5pm CST are processed the following business day. Total delivery time includes both production and shipping duration.

For questions about banner frame production scheduling, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom Banner Frame Orders

All banner frame orders require full payment before production begins. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate processing.

Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before banner frame production can begin. Learn more about check payment processing for banner frame orders.

Credit card charges are processed only after order confirmation and approval. For banner frame orders requiring proofs, payment processing occurs after proof approval.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Banner Frame & Hardware Delivery

Banner frame systems require specialized packaging due to hardware components and banner size. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight, dimensions, and destination address.

For questions about banner frame shipping requirements, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order to discuss specific delivery needs.

Professional Shipping Standards for Banner Frames

  • Tracking numbers provided for all banner frame shipments
  • Additional charges apply to oversized banner frame orders
  • Damaged hardware or banners must be returned for replacement processing
  • Lost shipments replaced after carrier confirmation (7-10 business days)
  • International banner frame shipments require customer-provided documentation

Available Shipping Methods for Large Frame Systems

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 business days delivery
  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days delivery
  • Three Day: 3 business days delivery
  • Two Day: 2 business days delivery
  • Overnight: 1 business day delivery

Economy shipping may require additional postal information in Address Line 2 for proper delivery of banner frame shipments.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Banner Frame Uses & Applications

Banner frames provide professional mounting solutions for a wide variety of commercial and institutional applications:

  • Retail Storefronts: Professional window and wall displays for promotions and branding
  • Construction Sites: Durable job site signage and company identification
  • Real Estate: Professional property signage and development advertising
  • Restaurants: Menu displays and promotional signage for outdoor dining areas
  • Healthcare Facilities: Wayfinding and informational displays
  • Educational Institutions: Campus signage and event announcements
  • Government Buildings: Public information and directional signage
  • Corporate Offices: Professional building identification and announcements

The quick-change banner system makes banner frames ideal for businesses requiring frequent signage updates for seasonal promotions, special events, or changing information displays.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Artwork Requirements for Print Production

Professional banner frame graphics require specific file preparation to ensure optimal print quality and proper fit within the frame system.

File Format Requirements for Banner Frames

  • Preferred: Vector .eps files with outlined fonts
  • Acceptable: High-resolution .pdf, .tiff, or .jpg files (300 DPI minimum)
  • Maximum File Size: 60 MB for online upload
  • Color Mode: CMYK preferred for accurate color reproduction

Banner Frame Template Guidelines

Download our professional banner frame templates to ensure proper artwork sizing and safe area guidelines:

  • 4' x 12' Banner Frame EPS Template
  • 4' x 12' Banner Frame PDF Template

For files larger than 60 MB, contact customer service for upload instructions to ensure fastest processing of your banner frame order.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Installation & Maintenance

Professional banner frame installation requires proper mounting hardware and techniques for secure, long-lasting displays.

Banner Frame Installation Process

Each banner frame kit includes detailed installation instructions and all necessary mounting hardware for most common surface types. The universal mounting system accommodates brick, concrete, wood, and metal surfaces.

Watch our professional installation video to learn proper mounting techniques and banner insertion methods for optimal display results.

Banner Replacement Process

The innovative snap-frame design allows banner changes in minutes without removing the frame from the wall. Simply open the frame edges, remove the existing banner, insert the new banner, and snap the frame closed.

Replacement banners can be ordered separately using our banner frame templates to ensure proper sizing and fit within your existing frame system.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom 4' x 12' Banner Frame System Today

Transform your business signage with professional banner frames that combine durability, versatility, and professional appearance. Our complete banner frame systems include heavy-duty aluminum hardware and your custom printed vinyl banner, ready for immediate installation.

Take advantage of our quick-change banner system to keep your promotional signage current and effective. Whether you need retail storefront displays, construction site signage, or professional building identification, our banner frames provide the perfect solution for businesses requiring frequent signage updates.

Every banner frame system includes:

  • Heavy-duty aluminum frame with weather-resistant finish
  • Universal mounting hardware for various surface types
  • Custom printed vinyl banner in your choice of 13 oz or 18 oz material
  • Complete installation instructions and support
  • 7-10 business day production with tracking provided

Ready to upgrade your business signage? Configure your custom banner frame system above or contact our design team at (320) 391-5300 for personalized assistance with your signage project.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Banner Frames

What surfaces can banner frames be mounted on?

Banner frames include universal mounting hardware suitable for brick, wood, concrete, metal, and most other solid flat surfaces. The mounting system is designed to provide secure attachment for long-term outdoor use.

How long do banner frames last outdoors?

The heavy-duty aluminum frame construction with weather-resistant finish is engineered for years of outdoor use under extreme conditions. The frame system maintains structural integrity and professional appearance throughout extended weather exposure.

How quickly can banners be changed in the frame?

The innovative snap-frame design allows banner changes in just a few minutes without removing the frame from the wall or using tools. Simply open the frame edges, swap banners, and snap closed.

Can I order replacement banners for existing frames?

Yes, replacement banners can be ordered separately using our banner frame templates. This ensures proper sizing and fit within your existing frame system while maintaining professional display quality.

What file formats work best for banner frame graphics?

Vector-based .eps files with outlined fonts provide the best print quality. High-resolution .pdf, .tiff, or .jpg files (300 DPI minimum) are also acceptable. Use our provided templates for optimal results.

Do banner frames work for indoor use?

Yes, banner frames are suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications. The professional appearance and quick-change capability make them ideal for retail stores, offices, lobbies, and other indoor commercial spaces.

What's included with each banner frame order?

Each complete banner frame kit includes the aluminum frame hardware, universal mounting hardware, installation instructions, and your custom printed vinyl banner ready for display.

How do I ensure proper color matching for my banner graphics?

For color-critical applications, we recommend our Color Match Proof System. Contact customer service to discuss specific color matching requirements for your banner frame project.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
